movie.actors: Lea Thompson, Jeffrey Jones, Tim Robbins, Ed Gale
movie.plot: A sarcastic humanoid duck is pulled from his homeworld to Earth where he must stop a hellish alien invasion with the help of a nerdy scientist and a cute struggling female rock singer who fancies him.
movie.title: Howard the Duck
movie.writer: Steve Gerber (Marvel comics character: Howard the Duck), Willard Huyck, Gloria Katz
